sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ سُلَيْمَانُ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ رُكُوبَ الدَّرَّاجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sulejman je želio naučiti voziti bicikl.
sentences.translationEn: Sulayman wanted to learn how to ride a bicycle.

sentences.arabic: أَمْسَكَ أَبُوهُ بِالدَّرَّاجَةِ وَسَاعَدَهُ فِي الْبِدَايَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otac mu je držao bicikl i pomagao mu u početku.
sentences.translationEn: His father held the bicycle and helped him at the start.

sentences.arabic: سَقَطَ سُلَيْمَانُ مَرَّتَيْنِ لَكِنَّهُ لَمْ يَسْتَسْلِمْ.
sentences.translation: Sulejman je pao dvaput ali se nije predao.
sentences.translationEn: Sulayman fell twice but he did not give up.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ رَكِبَ الدَّرَّاجَةَ وَحْدَهُ وَفَرِحَ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Na kraju je sam vozio bicikl i jako se obradovao.
sentences.translationEn: In the end he rode the bicycle alone and was very happy.
